dialogues.text: You don't look so good. That's not my problem. Thirty. And keep moving.
dialogues.yes_response: Smart. I didn't see you. You didn't see me.
dialogues.no_response: Wrong call. But alright. Keep moving anyway.

dialogues.text: I've been watching this block. You've been making your rounds. I need thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. I'll make sure your rounds go smooth.
dialogues.no_response: I'll remember that. I remember most things.

dialogues.text: I know who you've been visiting. I'm not here about that. I'm here for thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Quiet transaction. That's how I prefer it.
dialogues.no_response: You're sure? Think about what kind of day you want to have.
dialogues.alt_text: I know whose money's in your pocket. I'm not asking where it came from. Thirty, and I forget I noticed.
dialogues.alt_yes_response: Good. Then I never saw it. Neither did you.
dialogues.alt_no_response: Bold. Walking around carrying that, telling me no. I'll remember it.

dialogues.text: Off duty means off the record. Thirty. Nobody finds out about this.
dialogues.yes_response: Good answer. Pretend this didn't happen.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. Pretend it didn't happen either way. That part's free.

dialogues.text: I've got a situation at home. Everybody's got something. Thirty bucks.
dialogues.yes_response: I appreciate the discretion. You seem like you understand how things work.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. I'll sort it myself. You take care of yours.

dialogues.text: This neighborhood runs better when there's an understanding. You follow me? Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Smart. Real smart. Now have a good rest of your day.
dialogues.no_response: That's a shame. You seemed like a reasonable person.

dialogues.text: Look. I'll be honest. It's been a long week. I just need thirty. Cash.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. That's the most honest I've been all day.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. You win this one. Get going.

dialogues.text: Whatever you're trying to get done today — thirty makes it easier. For both of us.
dialogues.yes_response: Exactly. A quiet understanding. Good doing business.

dialogues.text: I'm not going to make this complicated. Thirty. And you go on with your day.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. You didn't see me. I didn't see you. Clean.
dialogues.no_response: You sure? Look like you've got places to be.

dialogues.text: You look like someone who's running out of time. I get that. Thirty and I'm out of your way.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Go do whatever it is you're trying to do. I mean that.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. I hope the rest of your day goes better than this part.
